entry.title: Re: No selected agent issue in workflow

entry.title: C4C - Change log for Restriction Rules
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I need to view change logs for Restriction rules. I went to Administrator > Business Rules > 'Selected a business rule' > Changes. This only shows changes in Access Restriction but not changes in Restriction Rules. Any help would be really appreciated.

entry.title: Condition-based exception handling for process instances through “Process Visibility” Actions
entry.content:
Introduction:

In this Blog, I would like to explain how  

  • Exceptions can be handled in your processes using Process Visibility actions, based on conditions.  

  • The triggering of processes can be enabled based on visibility insights, to receive notifications and react to critical situations. 

This Blog aims to provide information about the configuration steps to leverage the insight to action workflows to notify administrators and/or business users when certain conditions arise in a business process. 

 

Process flow - Setup and Configuration:

Subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation as documented here. 

Configure SAP Build Process Automation Destination as described in the Prerequisites section towards the end of this Blog.

 

Use case:

The Sales Order Management scenario is used to illustrate this Blog. Based on sales order data received as input, the approval process is optimised and happens manually or automatically. In case the process fails, some actors can be notified, as Administrator or Business Expert, via a trigger capability in Process Visibility. 

See below, a collapsed view of the process model:

 

Process Model

So, in this Sales Order Management Project, we have an Order Processing Demo process (as shown above). The project for Sales Order Management contains several artifacts including a process, an automation and a visibility scenario. The process model Order Processing Demo has a Form trigger. The user will enter a SalesOrderID and submit. An automation is then executed to extract the Sales Order details (sales order amount, etc.) from an excel document based on the SalesOrderID. Manual or automatic approval is evaluated into a condition and recipients receive a notification. 

There is also a Process Visibility scenario to notify Administrators or Business Users when a State (i.e. abruptly ended), a Status (i.e. critical) or SubStatus (i.e. failed) is reached. There are standard States, Status and SubStatus and it is also possible to create custom ones. It is possible to define a System trigger (automatic trigger) or User action trigger (manual trigger) in the Process Visibility scenario and configure the workflow or process that will be started if the condition is met (i.e. Process SubStatus equals failed). 

Please see the help documentation for more details. 

In our use case, we have modelled a Visibility scenario with an action (Trigger type: System) to trigger a workflow (NotifyProcessAdministrators) on failed or suspended instances.

 

Let’s get into the configuration details.. 

So, within the Visibility scenario, firstly appropriate attribute needs to be created. This is required, as the context needs to be passed, when the workflow from Process Visibility is to be triggered. Within the context, two values are passed. 

  • SubStatus – This is a default Attribute from Process Visibility, to provide insights on a process state.  

 

Details about the SubStatus are available in the 'Status' tab.  

 Status

  • workflowInstanceID – This is a Calculated Attribute that needs to be created. In this case, please note that the Name needs to be the same as used in the workflow start payload. 

This information will be used (for example), in the Task title sent to the administrator.  

Attribute_1

 

Attribute_2

As a next step, a destination with configuration OAuth2ClientCredentials would be required to start an instance of the workflow. See Prerequisites section for destination configuration. This destination will be used later in the configuration. It is meant to initiate the workflow. 

To demo the feature, we are using an existing workflow model, available at SAP Business Accelerator Hub. This workflow can be consumed from Process Visibility scenario with minimal configuration. It is triggered when the Process Status changes to any of the defined/custom statuses configured in the scenario. In our case, as our actions include ‘suspended’/’failed’, a workflow should be triggered when these conditions are met. 

Below, an overview of the model opened within SAP Business Application Studio. When the SubStatus condition is reached and evaluated, the recipient will receive a user task to process. 

Note: A group within SAP BTP for Process Admin / Process Operator needs to be available in the SAP BTP Cockpit and configured with users. If the group is not available as task recipient, then assign the task manually from the monitoring application. 

 Workflow Model

 

Then, select the 'Actions' tab to create an action. You can either trigger a workflow or a process. We are calling a Workflow in our case with the below configuration. 

 

Actions

 

'Conditions' section would be shown once action is created. You will have the option to create certain conditions to Indicate when the Workflow will be triggered. Here, we have defined the conditions (Process Failed / Process Suspended).  

Select the relevant trigger type: in our case ‘System’ 

Select the Environment variable that was created in the project.  

Workflow definition: You can select a workflow or a process. Here we select a workflow as we have already deployed this model in our tenant.  

Start context: Pass the name of the calculated attribute “workflowInstanceId” that was created in the earlier step.

Add Conditions using ‘Status’ and ‘SubStatus’ attributes.

'Save' and 'activate' your Visibility Scenario. 

 

At runtime, on SubStatus change, Process Visibility will trigger the System action and will start the workflow. A workflow task will be available in the inbox of the recipient group. 

During the workflow execution at runtime, if an unforeseen situation occurs, Process Visibility will start the workflow definition “NotifyProcessAdministrators” to notify the recipients, that the process requires attention. In our scenario, the recipients will receive a task with details about the instance and the latest error message. The workflow model is fully customisable.

 My Inbox 

 The instances of the notifications workflows are visible in SAP Build Monitoring section. 

 

Logs

 

The context data of the instance is also visible and contains information about the failed process. The administrator can navigate to the failed instance to analyse the logs in detail and take necessary steps for resolution of the issue. 

 Context

Note: Ensure that you regenerate the scenario data in the Monitoring section (Path: Monitoring --> Visibility Scenarios --> <Your_Visibility_Scenario> --> Processing Information --> Clear Processed Data. Once the data is cleared, click on ‘Process Data’ 

 

Prerequisites:

  • HTTP destination is required in the BTP subaccount where SAP Build Process Automation is subscribed. Create a destination with the name “sap_process_automation_service” and with the following configuration, if it doesn’t exist already. Please refer to this documentation to understand how HTTP destination is created.  

Destination1

 

  • Destination with the Authentication: OAuth2ClientCredentials needs to be configured to start an instance of the workflow. More configuration details of the destination be found here. 

 

Destination2

Recap:

Trigger Process -> Needs no destination. This is only available in SAP Build Process Automation and not in Workflow Management. 

Trigger Workflow -> Is offered both in SAP Build Process Automation and Workflow Management. 

For Workflow Management, please refer to this document on how the destination should be created.  

For SAP Build Process Automation, please refer this documentation. 

 

Should you have any questions, you can comment below or post a question to our SAP Build Process Automation forum. Check out our SAP Road Map Explorer to know more about upcoming features.

Until the next blog post, stay tuned!

entry.title: Re: Service Layer Attachment upload Error Code -1 "BadFormat"

I'm facing a similar issue while trying to input an attachment in a external server via Service Layer.

The return is:

Did you have any ideas?

entry.title: Internal error (-47) occurred - Upload Attachment via Service Layer
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm facing a problema while trying to upload an attachment via Service Layer which is installed in a external server. Is a HANA DB.

I've already saw the permissions in the Linux server, and all the folders (mount point and temp) are set with 0777 permissions.

When I upload the attachment in a server within the same network as the linux server, works perfectly fine.

Any ideas of what's missing or i'm doing wrong?

BR,

Chris.

entry.title: Re: Interesting Query - SQL Challenge !
entry.content:
Understanding this question was posted and answered during the beginning of COVID-19, we're in another wave so this query hit my search results. I have a similar algorithm, though not yet avoiding this hurdle:

avoid the referencing on YSAM_SICKNESS being done twice

Instead of a JOIN, I have nested select clauses. Entering column names instead of "*" in a count function makes your intent more clear.

having 
  count(patientid) = (
    select
      count(symptomid)


instead of:

having 
  count(*) = (
    select
      count(*)
select
  patientid,
  count(patientid),
  min(symptomid),
  max(symptomid)
from
  ysam_pat_tests
where
  symptomid in (
    select
        symptomid
      from
        ysam_sickness
      where
        sicknessname = 'Corona Virus'
      )
group by
  patientid
having
  count(patientid) = (
    select
      count(symptomid)
    from
      ysam_sickness
    where
      sicknessname = 'Corona Virus'
)
;

results locally (not HANA):

select patientid, min(patientname) as nm, count(patientid), min(symptomid), max(symptomid) from ysam_pat_tests where symptomid in (select symptomid from ysam_sickness where sicknessname = 'Corona Virus') group by patientid having count(patientid) = (select count(symptomid) from  ysam_sickness where sicknessname = 'Corona Virus');

 patientid | nm | count | min | max
-----------+----+-------+-----+-----
      1002 | B  |     2 |   1 |   2
      1003 | C  |     2 |   1 |   2
(2 rows)

entry.title: Re: IAS/ SSO login for user with two different SF usernam...
entry.content:
Hi Zeba

You'll need to keep unique emails in order to be able to synch SF users to IAS. You can assign dummy emails to users in SF and add a transformation in IAS so IPS will generate unique emails for all those users with same email. Let's say you add a dummy email to the Admin users in SF like "SSFFADMINS@TEST.com" and using the IPS transformation you'll usually end up creating a user in IAS like "afd343-f-....@sap-test.de".

You can then enable conditional authentication to the SF application and you'll see a link like this:

the Admin user should be able to login to SF using the link you see in conditional auth. This will authenticate the user using the password in IAS and you can enable MFA in IAS for the user.

You can also work with conditional auth by assigning users to different groups (i.e you can assign a group to admin users) so they can use a different authentication method. The issue with this is that you'll end up complicating the SSO experience for the rest of the users since you'll get a first screen from IAS asking the user to enter the email/ID and redirecting to IAS/ or different IDPs depending on groups assigned or certain conditions of the users/ network.

You can check more details here https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/configure-conditional-authentication-for-application

Thanks

Diego

entry.title: Re: Master Data Integration how to connect a QAS Tenant?
entry.content: Added Extensibility tag.

entry.title: Re: Unable to assign Warehouse with Storage location and plant
entry.content: Added Supply Chain tag.

entry.title: customer payment request and issuing invoice to customer at item level
entry.content: hello, guys In our real business, there is a scenario I've ran into, and hope guys can give me some guidance. we operate EPC projects, and the project period is long, more than 1 year. As for our sales contract billinging, we obey milestone billing such as 20% percentage down payment 40% partial payment 30% partial payment 10% final payment these items above are our customer payment requrest at contract level. but when we issue invoice to our customer, that means on financial booking with AR as well as our revenue and sales tax, we need to include specific products we provided in order. And normally the invoicing will be partial. for example: we have 5 products A,B,C,D,E in our sales order . the first time we issue invoice to customer, invoice items include A,B,E the second time we issue invoice to customer, invoice items include C,D and final invoice to customer, we need issue invoice with installment service. I want get some advice, how to deal this in SD order - To combine and differciate the customer payment request and invoicing in SAP sales order? Is it neccessary to use header billing plan or not? thanks a lot Emma

entry.title: [Byd] How to check all the logs for some certain business scenario made by a specific user.
entry.content:
Good morning.

A question, is it possible to see the changes and creations that a user made in the system?

I want to know what movements or corrections a specific user made on a a specific time.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: [Byd] How to check all the logs for some certain busi...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

There is no certain report for this specific requirement, but you can find the data sources/reports containing Created By or Changed By from the product documentation, so that you can find the relevant records in the corresponding reports based on the Created By/Changed By information based on your actual needs.

  1. Go to SAP Business ByDesign Help Portal
  2. Search for Characteristic Indexes in Bydesign
  3. Open E-CHAR-INDEX(PDF) 
  4. Click Ctrl+ F on your keyboard
  5. Query Created by or Created by, then you would find all the Data Sources/ Reports containing the fields.
  6. Go to Business Analytics Wok Center.
  7. Navigate to Design Reports View or to Data Sources View.
  8. Search for the report or data source for your actual business.
  9. Open the report or data source.
  10. Query the records by Created by/ Changed by/ some related filters.

[Note: If you cannot find any relevant reports or data sources, it means that SAP does not have the data you need. You can submit a case to SAP to confirm if the data you need exists in the backend.]

 

Best regards,

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: Goods receipt posting is not allowed in storage type...
entry.content: I also got the same error. I mistakenly assigned the GR-Zone to the final destination bin , where it should have been assigned to the 9010 storage bin.

entry.title: Re: Joule and SAP Business AI Now available for RISE with SAP Customers

It's great news that PCE customers will be able to try out Joule through the EAC program following the Public editions. However, it would be even better if we could get a clearer understanding of what PCE customers can accomplish with Joule. I can't seem to find the roadmap of joule for PCE customers.

Lastly, could you share the release or EAC schedule for On-Premise customers?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Empowering Public Sector Users of SAP S/4HANA Cloud with SAP Business AI
entry.content:
Thank you.

This blog provides great information.

Using Joule for efficient navigation and accurate task execution is excellent. However, if there are custom apps in S/4HANA, is there a way for Joule to learn these custom apps? If custom apps are excluded, there is a risk of providing inaccurate information.

entry.title: Re: Problem with function module MS_WORD_OLE_FORMLETTER for creating form letters
entry.content: I've run into similar issues with the MS_WORD_OLE_FORMLETTER function module before! One common problem is that the function module might not be fully compatible with newer versions of Microsoft Word or the specific configuration settings in your system. Make sure that the OLE Automation setup is correct and that all required libraries and references are available. Also, check if there are any restrictions with the security settings in Word that might prevent the form letter from being generated properly. Updating your SAP system and Word integration settings might resolve the issue. Has anyone else experienced this and found a solution? read more https://github.com/nsubstitute/NSubstitute/blob/main/Directory.Build.props

entry.title: ODN number appears should appear in the Alt. Refer. field in Customer Credit Memo (DG) documents.
entry.content:
Dear esteemed members,

When I post a Customer Credit Memo (DG) transaction, the ODN number is not appearing in the Alt. Refer. field. Instead it is updating the Reference field. We have checked all the configurations. Kindly help and guide please. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Subtotals in ALV Tree at every node
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an ALV Tree like this

Here I want the subtotals for every node in their parent node level. So those nodes should have the summation of it's child node values instead of 0.00 - In this case GL Senders should be added to GL Account, GL Accounts to FS Items, FS Items to TSIJ.

I have used cl_salv_tree=>factory method to make the ALV Tree. I have checked there is a do_sum method but that only works for Field Catalogues. 

Can you please help me with an example code on how to do it?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Subtotals in ALV Tree at every node
entry.content: Dty

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "ABAP Core Data Services" developer challenge
entry.content:
Hi @Shilpa_Shankar  & @sheenamk ,

Regarding: Task 3.
The Value help on the status text field appears but fails to select on selection.
In the below snap the Status "Open(O)"  is selected but it is not filtered.



Tech Details:
Annotation for the status text field

 @UI:{ lineItem: [{ position: 40 }], identification: [{ position: 40}] }
  @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{
      entity: {
          name: '/DMO/I_Overall_Status_VH_Text',
          element: 'overall_status'
      }
  }]
  @EndUserText.label: 'Status Text'
  CurrentStatus;

Service Type selected during Service Binding: ODATA V4 - UI.

Warm Regards,
Surya L

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations

a.Search and Status Value HelpSearch & Filtering
b.Result of Search and Filtering
Search: "Business Trip", Status: "Accepted"

 

Warm Regards
Surya L

entry.title: Re: Display DOCX/XLSX in Archivelink document viewer from...

  • Is it WebGUI or Fiori Apps ? WebGui

  • The current viewer you are using in SAPGUI, is it a standard SAPGUI viewer or a viewer from another provider such as OpenText ? standard SAPGUI viewer

Regards,

Abdulfattah Hussein

entry.title: Re: class and method

entry.title: Re: Disable Actions button in sales orders
entry.content: Dear customer,

entry.title: Re: Condition-based exception handling for process instances through “Process Visibility” Actions
entry.content:
Thanks for highlighting the topic of monitoring processes again. I have 2 questions perhaps you can help me understand on the topic:

  1. SAP Cloud ALM (for Operations) is another tool from SAP for Administrators to monitor processes. How does Process Visibility fit into a landscape where SAP Cloud ALM (for operations) is already used or proposed as it is recommended by clean core approach?    
  2. Exception handling especially when this is addressed by Business Users can be designed as part of Processes in Process Automation and in S/4 with Situation Handling. What is SAP's recommendation for exception handling in processes? Is Exception handling in Process Visibility for cases where this cannot be designed into.

entry.title: Re: SAP Devops CI/CD - CAP project with mtaext configurat...
entry.content:
SAP recommended best practice is to Integrate SAP Cloud Transport Management into Your CI/CD Pipeline

Then, MTA extensions can be added to the import queue in cloud transport management.

SAP Help > SAP Cloud Transport Management > Using the Import Queue > Upload MTA Extension Descriptor...

entry.title: Re: Disable Actions button in sales orders
entry.content:
Dear customer,

From CRM application point of view, the access restriction for sales order checks if the login user can read or write the certain sales order. I cannot control one or certain field/button on the order, as long as the user has the access to write access, he/she can edit the content on the order.

And also it is not possible to disable a standard button by customization or by PDI or UI Designer.

Thanks,

Adie

entry.title: SAP Community 2024 accepts URL to one Website which goes to another Website
entry.content:
Hi, SAP Community 2024 doesn't prevent URL texts from being "https://..." or "http://..." which are different from the actual URL.

e.g. today https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/problem-with-function-module-ms-word-ole-formletter-for-creating-form/m-p/13806086#M2030389 let thinks that https://github.com/... goes to https://github.com/... but it goes to somewhere else as you can see:

Could SAP Community 2024 forbid https/http texts of URLs which are different from the URL?

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I identify myself in following category,

  • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
  • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
  • First generation college students
  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life. 

I completed my college and joined a factory in which I got opportunity to use sap software, I want to pursue career in SAP but have very limited access. It will be great if you can help me further.

entry.title: Re: Generative AI with SAP – Part 1: Introduction to SAP Business AI
entry.content:
Hello Raj,thanks for sharing the information.

I also understand from various public forums that SAP plans to enable its clients to leverage external generative AI models, such as ChatGPT or Llama, through SAP BTP. I'm curious about how these external models would process a request from an SAP S4HANA user. Would they rely solely on their existing training data, or would SAP provide additional context or data specific to the user's business? I'm wondering if there might be a gap in my understanding or if I'm missing something important.

Br.

@Raja_Gupta

entry.title: Re: Subtotals in ALV Tree at every node
entry.content:
Sorry but CL_SALV_TREE doesn't contain a method named DO_SUM.

There is no concept of "field catalog" in SALV.

For totals, averages and so on, use the "aggregations":

tree->get_aggregations( )->add_aggregation(
                                 columnname  = 'YOUR_COLUMN_NAME'
                                 aggregation = if_salv_c_aggregation=>total ).

entry.title: Re: Error "No INBOX Selection for the Partner".
entry.content: can u please share the solution. I am having same issue

entry.title: Re: SAP Devops CI/CD - CAP project with mtaext configurat...
entry.content: You can add `-e file.mtaext` to `mtaDeployParameters` in your `.pipeline/config.yaml`

entry.title: Re: Master Data Integration how to connect a QAS Tenant?
entry.content: Hey .@anildeep7 Thanks for your response. Yep. The 401 was on S4 communication arrangement. I was setting the BP replication between S4 and Subscription Billing via MDI. I realized that I had to send a parameter like tenantID at the end of the SOAP URL on MDI. Added and the end (Keep in mind this parameter must be the name of the subaccount) and that is. Now it is working. Thanks!!!

entry.title: Re: Master Data Integration how to connect a QAS Tenant?
entry.content: Hey @anildeep7  Thanks for your response. Yep. The 401 was on S4 communication arrangement. I was setting the BP replication between S4 and Subscription Billing via MDI. I realized that I had to send a parameter like tenantID at the end of the SOAP URL on MDI. Added and the end (Keep in mind this parameter must be the name of the subaccount) and that is. Now it is working. Thanks!!!

entry.title: Re: how to see quantity per warehouse in list of items

Place the cursor at whse field, then press Ctrl + Tab, system will show stock info per warehouse.

Hope this helps,

SonTran

entry.title: UDF not displaying on DocumentLine with custom B1S-Schema on SAP B1 Service Layer (HANA)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to retrieve data for UDF from DocumentLine in SAP B1 Service Layer using a custom schema (B1S-Schema) and I receive the error as  invalid property, but if I retrieve data without the B1S-Schema the data from UDF is displayed. 

I am currently running SAP B1 10 FP2405. The same error was encountered on older versions as well.

I have attached the screenshots for more clarity.

Data retrieved without B1S-Schema:

Data retrieved using B1S-Schema:

Any help in this matter will be appreciated. Thank you

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA  SAP Business One Extensibility @ANKIT_CHAUHAN

entry.title: What is the effect of transferring or selling product without doing invoices verification
entry.content: What is the effect of transferring or selling product without invoice verification is not done for the received product from suppliers

entry.title: Re: Sending notification to SAP build workzone from CAP app
entry.content: Please use the CAP Plugin https://github.com/cap-js/notifications instead. But be aware that you have to use CAP 7 right now until Current peerDependency doesn't match cds 8 #57 is fixed.

entry.title: Re: Summary Row for a SQL HANA Query Error
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Try this

 

SELECT
T2."Indicator",
T0."DocNum",
T0."TaxDate" AS "Doc Date",
DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."TaxDate", CURRENT_DATE) AS "No. Of Days",
T0."CardName",
T0."NumAtCard",
CAST(COALESCE(T3."InsTotal", 0) AS DECIMAL(15, 2)) AS "Total Amount",
CAST(COALESCE(T3."InsTotal", 0) - COALESCE(T3."PaidToDate", 0) AS DECIMAL(15, 2)) AS "Open Amount",
T1."SlpName"
FROM
ORDR T0
INNER JOIN RDR6 T3 ON T0."DocEntry" = T3."DocEntry"
INNER JOIN OSLP T1 ON T0."SlpCode" = T1."SlpCode"
INNER JOIN OPID T2 ON T0."PIndicator" = T2."Indicator"
WHERE
DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."TaxDate", CURRENT_DATE) > 365
AND T0."CANCELED" = 'N'
AND T0."DocStatus" = 'O'

UNION ALL

SELECT
'0',
'0',
'0',
'0',
'0',
'Total',
CAST(SUM(COALESCE(T3."InsTotal", 0)) AS DECIMAL(15, 2)),
CAST(SUM(COALESCE(T3."InsTotal", 0) - COALESCE(T3."PaidToDate", 0)) AS DECIMAL(15, 2)),
''
FROM
ORDR T0
INNER JOIN RDR6 T3 ON T0."DocEntry" = T3."DocEntry"
INNER JOIN OSLP T1 ON T0."SlpCode" = T1."SlpCode"
INNER JOIN OPID T2 ON T0."PIndicator" = T2."Indicator"
WHERE
DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."TaxDate", CURRENT_DATE) > 365
AND T0."CANCELED" = 'N'
AND T0."DocStatus" = 'O';

entry.title: Re: SBPA: Decision step in Process fails with error destination 'bpmworkflowruntime_rule' not found
entry.content: Hi Dinu,

entry.title: S/4HANA Group Reporting Analytics – Reporting Item API and MDA based Analytical Reports
entry.content:
Introduction

In this blog, we will discuss about the new Reporting Item API of Group Reporting that will be delivered with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.1.  We will also show how  to create Hierarchy variables and restricted structure members for Group Reporting queries using Custom analytical queries and Services application. Additionally, we will demo on how to publish the Group Reporting based custom query in Multidimensional Analysis Grid.

 

Reporting Item API: API_CNSLDTNRLBSDGRPJRNLITM

This new API contains the Reporting Item as a field and displays it member values along with key figures and other fields. In the API without reporting item: API_CNSLDTNGRPJRNLITEM there were 3 hierarchy parameters. In this API, we have added two more  parameters: P_ConsolidationRptgItemHier and P_ConsolidationRptgRuleID. Similar to the analytical applications, for e.g. Group Data Analysis with Reporting Rules, you need to provide the ConsolidationReportingItem hierarchy  and ConsolidationReportingRuleID that are already defined in the Define Reporting Rules. Similarly, you need to provide it in the API and you can look at the sample URI:

sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CNSLDTNRLBSDGRPJRNLITM/CnsldtnRuleBsdGrpJrnlItem(P_ConsolidationUnitHierarchy='%24',P_ConsolidationPrftCtrHier='%24',P_ConsolidationSegmentHier='%24',P_KeyDate=datetime'2024-12-31T00:00:00',P_ConsolidationRptgItemHier='X2',P_ConsolidationRptgRuleID='Y10')/Results?$select=ConsolidationUnit,FinancialStatementItem,FiscalYearPeriod,ConsolidationReportingItem,ProfitCenter,SubItem,AmountInGroupCurrency&$filter=ConsolidationVersion eq 'Y10' and PeriodMode eq 'YTD' and ConsolidationGroup eq 'CG2' and FiscalYear eq '2022'

In the Video below, you will see a demo on how you can use this API for SAC using the ODATA Service:

 

Multidimensional Analysis Grid Using Group Reporting Data Source

You can now publish the Group Reporting Custom query in Multidimensional Analysis Grid. The pre-requisites are:

  • Analytical Query of type V3 (CDS Analytical Projection Views)
  • INA Service

The queries that are created in the new app: "Custom Analytical Queries and Services" are of type V3. You can watch a demo below on how to create the V3 query:

You will notice that in the above demo you can create Variables, provide fixed values for dimensions, choose dimensions and key figures as per your use case. Most of it was possible in the previous release also using the app.: Custom Analytical Queries.

You can also create a FS Item hierarchy variables as shown below:

The variables can also used in a Restricted measure or Key figure. It is possible to create restricted structure member in the custom query. Please watch the below demo that illustrates the creation of Current Year VS Previous Year for Amount in Group Currency.

Now its time to create an INA service. Please make sure the custom query is published before creating an INA Service. In the app. "Custom Analytical Queries and Services" click the link "Manage InA Services " and follow the video below to create a service:

In the above example, you will see that the InA service is created out the custom query that we created in the above demo. 

Please now load the app "Manage KPI and Reports" and select the tab "Multidimensional Reports" and click the create button as shown below:

You can select the Custom query and INA Service and publish it as shown below:

While publishing you need to select the Business Catalog and you can create a Custom Tile.

You can see the results on loading the app. based on Multidimensional Analysis grid:

 

Conclusion

Please feel free to share your thoughts by commenting on this blog. Also, we can use this blog as a communication tool for any clarification that you require on this topic. You can also follow my profile for more content on the analytical application for group reporting. I would recommend that you post your questions by specifying the tag: “SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting”.

entry.title: How to assign GL for valuated blocked stock in transit to Z07
entry.content:
Dears 

for import process in the customer will receive the goods at origin by movement type 107 

The customer need is replace GR IR GL with another GL to be for example stock in transit GL 

So I created Z07 movement type for this process but i need to assign the stock in transit GL 

so entries will be Debit INV , CR stock in transit

entry.title: Re: UDF not displaying on DocumentLine with custom B1S-Sc...
entry.content:
Hi allsanlawlas,

You appear to have the same scenario as mentioned in SAP Note 3502093.

The issue is supposed to be fixed in SP2411 for SAP Business One version 10.0.

Be advised that the time-frame is subject to change without any further notice.

If you would like to follow up, kindly create an incident under the component SBO-SDK-SVL for SAP Business One Support team.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SBPA: Decision step in Process fails with error desti...

Hi, 

I have the same issue as well. It would be great if someone could help out and share further information on how to fix this issue.

 

Thank you and BR;

Arnela Zauner

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: Hello!

entry.title: Skip workflow for Internal Hire from RCM to EC in Manage Pending Hire
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement where there is a workflow triggered in Employee Central MSS when there is a change like Promotion/Demotion in Employee Central for an employee by managers. This workflow is written using a business rule on Job Information.

However, the same workflow is triggering when an internal candidate is hired as an Internal Hire in manage Pending Hire from Recruiting to EC directly on a job requisition. We don't want the workflow to be triggered in this scenario.

Is there any condition we can add to bifurcate the Manage Pending Hire scenario and EC MSS scenario. Please suggest if you have configured something similar basis your experience.

entry.title: Re: Usage of TO_DECIMAL and SUM together
entry.content:
Hi,

Using these examples in your database will help you

--Case A: Using TO_DECIMAL After SUM

SELECT
TO_DECIMAL(SUM(sales_amount), 25, 10) AS total_sales
FROM
sales_data;

--Case B: Using SUM After TO_DECIMAL

SELECT
SUM(TO_DECIMAL(sales_amount, 25, 10)) AS total_sales
FROM
sales_data;

entry.title: Re: ORSC in validation link for a UDF
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP Business One, you can use Transaction Notification Resources. The master object is 290 (field :ObjType)

 

Danish

entry.title: Re: ORSC in validation link for a UDF
entry.content:
Hi araob,

Seems that you will have the option in SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2105.

Refer to SAP Note 3050052 for the same.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: APPROVAL PROCESS REPORT
entry.content:
Hi,

please try this query report

sELECT
T0."DraftEntry" as "Draft No",
T0."CreateDate" As "Request Date",
T0."CreateTime" as "Request Time",
t2."Name" As "Approval For",
T3."U_NAME" as "Request From",
t6."Comments" as "Remarks",
T4."U_NAME" as "Approver Name",
T1."UpdateDate" As "Approved Date",
T1."UpdateTime" as "Approved Time",
CASE WHEN T6."WddStatus" = 'W' 
THEN 'Pending' WHEN T6."WddStatus" = 'Y' 
THEN 'Approved' WHEN T6."WddStatus" = 'N' 
THEN 'Reject' WHEN T6."WddStatus" = 'C' 
THEN 'Pending' 
ELSE '-' 
END AS "Decision",
---T0."IsDraft" ,   
DAYS_BETWEEN (T1."UpdateDate",
CURRENT_DATE) AS "Days from Approved Date" 
fROM OWDD T0 
INNER JOIN WDD1 T1 ON T0."WddCode" = T1."WddCode" 
left outer join odrf t6 on t0."DraftEntry" = t6."DocEntry" 
and T6."ObjType" = T6."ObjType" 
left outer JOIN OWTM T2 ON T0."WtmCode" = T2."WtmCode" 
left outer JOIN OUSR T3 ON T0."OwnerID" = T3."USERID" 
left outer JOIN OUSR T4 ON T1."UserID" = T4."USERID" 
left outer JOIN OUDP T5 ON T3."Department" = T5."Code" 
Where (T0."IsDraft"='Y') 
and T6."DocStatus" ='O' 
and T6."WddStatus" not in ('C','N') 
 
union all sELECT
T0."DraftEntry" as "Draft No",
T0."CreateDate" As "Request Date",
T0."CreateTime" as "Request Time",
t2."Name" As "Approval For",
T3."U_NAME" as "Request From",
t6."Comments" as "Remarks",
T4."U_NAME" as "Approver Name",
T1."UpdateDate" As "Approved Date",
T1."UpdateTime" as "Approved Time",
CASE WHEN T6."WddStatus" = 'W' 
THEN 'Pending' WHEN T6."WddStatus" = 'Y' 
THEN 'Approved' WHEN T6."WddStatus" = 'N' 
THEN 'Reject' WHEN T6."WddStatus" = 'C' 
THEN 'Pending' 
ELSE '-' 
END AS "Decision",
DAYS_BETWEEN (T1."UpdateDate",
CURRENT_DATE) AS "Days from Approved Date" 
fROM OWDD T0 
INNER JOIN WDD1 T1 ON T0."WddCode" = T1."WddCode" 
left outer join odrf t6 on t0."DraftEntry" = t6."DocEntry" 
and T6."ObjType" = T6."ObjType" 
left outer JOIN OWTM T2 ON T0."WtmCode" = T2."WtmCode" 
left outer JOIN OUSR T3 ON T0."OwnerID" = T3."USERID" 
Left outer JOIN OUSR T4 ON T1."UserID" = T4."USERID" 
left outer JOIN OUDP T5 ON T3."Department" = T5."Code" 
Where T6."WddStatus" ='C' 
and T6."DocStatus" ='O' 
 
 
order by "Request Date"

entry.title: Re: Formatted Search in GRPO Rows to Display Remarks Base...
entry.content:
Hi

Try this solution:

SELECT
STRING_AGG(T1.U_MKTR_REMARKS, '; ') AS DisplayRemarks
FROM
OPDN T0
INNER JOIN PDN1 T1 ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry
WHERE
T1.U_MKTR_QUALITYRESULT = 'R'
AND T0.DocEntry = $[$8.DocEntry.0] 
GROUP BY
T0.DocEntry

entry.title: Seeking Advice on AI and Communication-Related Topics for Master’s Thesis
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently pursuing a Master’s in Media and Communication and working as a student at SAP. I’m planning to focus my thesis on the intersection of AI and communication, particularly within the SAP ecosystem.

I’m looking for suggestions on relevant and impactful thesis topics in this area. If anyone has ideas or knows of any SAP teams working on AI-driven communication strategies, I’d appreciate your guidance or connection.

Thanks in advance for your help!

Best,

Yasaman Jalaei

entry.title: Re: Report on SAP Signavio Process Intelligence data using the new OData API and SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Thanks for communcating this @hoangvu , very handy

hi @niels1515  

I agree witht the feedback provided by @hoangvu .

in addition I want to give a tangible example where this would be relevant.

In retail organizations of consumer packaged goods, it is well known that Seasonal Products and Allocations are usually a nightmare to deal with if there are no good analysis processes and dashaboards sliced and diced from different angles.

For example, many unique seasonal SKU/Products are developed and produced for the Halloween season. These products are developed and planned according to Marketing analysis and their potential financial benefit to the organization (Sales Revenue), because they usually they have a Premium Price; as well usually, Marketing tries to balance with the Production Team and the Demand Planning team, for production-time at the factory's production lines to produce these unique seasonal SKUs from the standard core products, and why it makes sense to produce them at some times cost of Core Skus with a regular volume but not a Premum price.

The Allocation Process, is usually common to take place in Halloween, and many times it is a complex process to observe and mine.

Many companies do not even like to "Model" an allocation process, because that way there is less accountability of who made the decisions and why many times customers without an initial allocation, ended up with getting product shipped and customers that were good customers that provided a forecast, ended up with nothing (i have seen it happen! ) or less volumes than what they forcasted and which the demand planner had commited to them per agreed allocation business rules.

In such cases, SAC would already have dashboards for Marketing, Sales and Finance, many times focusing on the Revenue at high level, and perhaps making it look like some of these SKUs sales were a success, because indeed all volume has sold. 

But if we can also pull process-mining data related to production processes and allocation processes, that would show that there were lots of Allocation Business Rules broken in the process which damages customer relationship and their trust in Demand Planning and Supply Network Planning and inefficiences in internal Production and Supply Network Planning processes, due to the Allocation business rules not being followed.

SAP Signavio Process Intelligence in this example, would support in process mining and  undersanding the amount of cases (case_id) that that show up as variants, that in an allocation process would never have happened for example ( which would demontrate adherence to business rules typical of Allocation process best practices)

Then we could have SAC dashboards that show widgets based on Process Efficieny metrics side by side with the typical Sales and Marketing dashboards.

This would many times, paint a very different picture of success of seasonal new product launch and final sales revenue, compared to all the increased cost issues and customer service issues related to the above examples I provide, which I have actually seen in many organizations.

This is why, Process Execution intelligence is, from my point fo view, very important. We now have the chance to mine information that will  better able to paint the entire picture of effectivity and alignment to business models.

entry.title: Re: Internal error (-5002) [Message 131-183] when try to...
entry.content: When using the service layer i had the same issue but when i removed the DocType from the posting body it worked perfectly.

entry.title: Re: IM002:[Microsoft][ODBC Driver Manager] Data Source na...
entry.content:
First issue is CR 2011 is 32 bit so you won't be able to connect to a 64 bit data source.

Second problem is the Repository is to connect to BO Enterprise's repository, where reports and other objects are saved.

So expand the ODBC connection and the DSN must be created using the 32 bit ODBC Admin tool.

entry.title: Is there a way to delete all recorded timesheet for a certain day for all employees on SAP SF?
entry.content: For a reason or another, I got wrong timesheet data for my company's employees on a certain day, I want to delete the timesheet for all active employees on that day so I run again my integration job to have the right input. Is there a way to delete all the timesheet of employees on a certain day?

entry.title: distribute the ratio of free goods value from billing to on return order at main item
entry.content:
how to distribute the ratio of free goods value item from the billing which act as reference document to make return order for the main item

In case of Following offer:

Piece Price = 1200 YER

Offer: Each 24 PC Qty 2 Free Goods

Each 12 Pc Qty 1 Free Good

For 10 Pc and less Calculate its Percentage from Piece Price  

For Return with 10 Pc takes back amount 1000 YER

For Return with 9 PC takes Back Amount 900 YER

Which means all fractions from Pc Qty take their percentage from Pc Price

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest Official Rules
entry.content: @hac I'm afraid there isn't anything we can do about that.  We can only offer in the countries which SAP legal approves.  They say there are legal restrictions that lead to the country listing.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest Official Rules
entry.content: @Rahul_Karda Right now you can check to make sure you are joined to this group. If you don't see the join button on the group homepage when logged in, then you are joined and therefore registered.  Shortly we will start assigning badges for registration and then the badge and the gameboard will indicate your registration.

entry.title: Re: Error while changing the business partner master
entry.content: This really solved my problem. Actually there was no data maintained in the config for this . I added UKM_S_CPBS_DISPLAY. But did not maintain any other settings. The error got resolved.

entry.title: Re: CSV to XML Converter with(multiple header and Footer) Header and item level data
entry.content:
Hi Ram, you Can try this script

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.xml.StreamingMarkupBuilder
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil
import java.util.ArrayList
import java.util.List

def Message processData(Message message) {
    def header = "AB"
    def footer = "XY"
   
   
    def fields = ["Field1", "Field2", "Field3", "Field4", "Field5", "Field6", "Field7", "Field8"]
   
    
    def csvPayload = message.getBody(java.lang.String)
   
   
    def lines = csvPayload.split("\n")
   
   
    def xmlOutput = new StringBuilder()
    xmlOutput.append("<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?>")
    xmlOutput.append("<root>")
   
    
    lines.each { line ->
        // Check if it's a header, footer, or data line
        if (line.startsWith(header)) {
           
            xmlOutput.append("<record>")
            def values = line.split(",")
            xmlOutput.append("<row>")
            fields.eachWithIndex { field, index ->
                xmlOutput.append("<${field}>${values[index].trim()}</${field}>")
            }
            xmlOutput.append("</row>")
        } else if (line.startsWith(footer)) {
           
            xmlOutput.append("</record>")
        } else {
            // Process data line
            def values = line.split(",")
            xmlOutput.append("<row>")
            fields.eachWithIndex { field, index ->
                xmlOutput.append("<${field}>${values[index].trim()}</${field}>")
            }
            xmlOutput.append("</row>")
        }
    }
   
    // Close the XML output
    xmlOutput.append("</root>")
   
    // Set the XML output as the new payload
    message.setBody(xmlOutput.toString())
   
    return message
}

entry.title: Re: Getting error with SF-OCN integration
entry.content: 401 unauthorized means you have an issue with the credentials you are using.

entry.title: Re: Fixed Asset Master data and capitalization for the depreciated machine
entry.content: Hi Yang, why don't you just use the current value as the initial value? As the depreciation of the asset was already used as expenses on pass accounting periods, you don't need them anymore.

entry.title: Re: Fixed Deposit gets doubled in Investment / Increase after rollover
entry.content: Hi @RBali, it is version 1501. However, my issue was repayment amount get double. I checked in later version, the fields Flow Type and Payment Amount are also populated but not get double.

entry.title: Re: Missing Order Type OR
entry.content:
Hello,

Technically you are not allowed to create your own sales order type "OR" in S/4HANA public cloud because:

  1. standard sales order type "OR" (in English) exists with internal ID "TA".
  2. there is SAP defined customer namespace for sales order type. The allowed customer namespaces are: Z*, Y*, and 9*.

Best regards,

Yong

entry.title: How to enable BOM material on sales order item and print it?
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Our client would like to know how to enable BOM material on the sales order item level and the same on the print layout.

Kindly advise.
Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to enable BOM material on sales order item and pr...
entry.content:
Hey there,

You are suggested to refer to the below documentations for details with regard to enabling Sales BOM material. You need to firstly ensure it is set up before considering printing it out:

Scope Item - Bill of Material Management (64F)
Help Portal - Maintain Bills of Material (Version 2)
Help Portal - Maintain Bill of Material
Fiori Apps Library - Maintain Bill Of Material (Version 2)
Fiori Apps Library - Maintain Bill Of Material

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports take up to 23 sec to show PDF SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi,

You can refer this SAP Note

2368927 - Poor performance when using Crystal Reports after environment changes - SAP for Me

Hope this helps,

SonTran

entry.title: WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE or WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2 ? What is the best ?
entry.content:
If you are here and now, then it is likely that you need to do a Picking, PGI or update some information about a Delivery and you don't know the correct RFCfor this.

Or, you somehow got to one of these two functions and are thinking "I'm going to use WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2, it's the newest one after all." or "I'm going to use WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2, I think 1 had a lot of bugs and so they made 2"

Or, it could be that you did a Google search and saw one of the many articles written by an Indian and saw the recommendation to use WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2.

And then you create your beautiful (or not) code that makes use of WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2and when testing it seems like everything went well, but in the Production environment you start to notice some problems. And then, in a new Google search, you find solutions like:

 

  • "Add DESTINATION NONE in the RFC call";
  • "Run the SERIAL_INTTAB_REFRESH function before or after the WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2 function";

 

Well, I created this article to demystify this topic!

Just like you, I had problems using the WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2 function and so I went to ask the creator! No, I'm not talking about God, but about SAP. I contacted SAP Product Support and discovered that the WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2 RFC is not for us mere customers or consultants:

 Thank you Catherine!

Well friends, today we learned that we should use WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE, okay!?

I hope I helped in some way!

entry.title: Re: How can i assign condition unit "points" to condition...
entry.content: I found error message "You cannot use condition type ZPNT in this business document. Message no. V1E050" in sales order creation

entry.title: Re: CSV to XML Converter with(multiple header and Footer) Header and item level data
entry.content:
More easy to understand  code 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.xml.MarkupBuilder
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil

def Message processData(Message message) {
    // Log the original body for debugging
    def messageLog = messageLogFactory.getMessageLog(message)

    
    def originalBody = message.getBody(String)
    if (messageLog) {
        messageLog.addAttachmentAsString("Original Body", originalBody, "text/plain")
    }

    
    def lines = originalBody.split('\n')


    def writer = new StringWriter()
    def xml = new MarkupBuilder(writer)

    xml.root {
        def recordOpen = false
        lines.each { line ->
            def fields = line.split(',')
            if (fields[0].trim() == 'AB') {
                if (recordOpen) {
                    xml.mkp.yieldUnescaped("</record>")
                }
                xml.mkp.yieldUnescaped("<record>")
                recordOpen = true
            }
            xml.row {
                Field1(fields[0].trim())
                Field2(fields[1].trim())
                Field3(fields[2].trim())
                Field4(fields[3].trim())
                Field5(fields[4].trim())
                Field6(fields[5].trim())
                Field7(fields[6].trim())
                Field8(fields[7].trim())
            }
            if (fields[0].trim() == 'XY') {
                xml.mkp.yieldUnescaped("</record>")
                recordOpen = false
            }
        }
        if (recordOpen) {
            xml.mkp.yieldUnescaped("</record>")
        }
    }

 
    message.setBody(XmlUtil.serialize(writer.toString()))

    return message
}

entry.title: How can I speak to a PhonePe executive?
entry.content: customer service team either phone,-075012-14159 email, or through their website's customer support portal. ✔️ 0830-950-1682 Submit a Written Complaint: Follow up your verbal complaint with a written support.phonepr
